contract: Classifies vendored lane-local test files that are not documented green. Entries must not be counted as pass claims; they reduce only the unmanifested/unclassified remainder.

entries.reason: The vendored Node22 file is a zero-byte placeholder and official nodejs/node v22.15.0 has no test/parallel/test-assert-class.js counterpart, so it is not a runnable public-support claim.

This official abort fixture asserts host process abort and exit-code behavior. The embedded Node22 runtime lane does not currently own destructive process-abort execution, so it remains a process-host gap rather than a green claim.

This official addon fixture depends on native addon loading in a non-Node context. The current embedded runtime lane does not own native-addon host execution, so it is classified as a loader/native-addon gap rather than an unknown.

groups.reason: These official Node22 process fixtures are outside the current manifested green process subset and cover host-sensitive process state, identity, environment, exit/abort, execve/dlopen, active-resource accounting, warnings, and signal behavior. They remain a process-host completion gap until promoted through measured runtime batches.
